prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，母体学校软科主榜排名约第62名（2026年）；克 拉玛依校区共享本部211/双一流身份，但地处新疆，对四川考生属跨省远距离办学，层次认知上略低于本部；该校近年未出现在学校声誉舆情、抖音热度总排名 前106名及投档线异常记录中，说明社会关注度一般，无明显正面或负面舆情事件干扰报考心理；共享中国石油大学（北京）学科评估结果，石油与天然气工程 为A+学科（全国顶尖），化学工程与技术为A-，地质资源与地质工程为B+；石油工程、油气储运工程等主干专业学科实力突出，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐；石油工程类相关专业热度平稳；四川省2026年高考总报名人数约535000人，较2025年（约462767人）增长约15. 6%，按近年物理类占比约61.5%估算，物理类考生约329000人，增幅约15.5%，竞争加剧。；该校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距四川较远 ，属于跨省远距离办学；近年该校在四川招生占比约5%-6%，是该校在西南地区的主要生源省份之一，地域偏好因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅 后移的基准、2026年计划继续小幅扩招（+3.8%）、本省物理类考生规模增长约15.5%加剧竞争，以及学校声誉平稳、石油主干学科吸引力稳定等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取 位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次约43331名，区间42831–43831名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022: approx. 50259th → 2023: approx. 40488th → 2024: approx. 34790th → 2025: approx. 42395th, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising over the past four years; 2025 shifted back by about 7600 places compared to 2024, with significantly eased competition, baseline ranking approx. 42395th; enrollment plan for Physics Category in Sichuan: 2022: 110, 2023: 117, 2024: 153, 2025: 158, 2026: 164, with consecutive years of expansion; 2026 adds 6 more (+3.8%) compared to 2025, continuing the expansion trend, which has a backward-shifting effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with the parent school ranking approx. 62nd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026); Karamay Campus shares the 211/Double First-Class status of the main campus, but is located in Xinjiang, which is a long-distance cross-provincial location for Sichuan candidates, with a slightly lower perceived level than the main campus; the school has not appeared in recent school reputation public opinion, Douyin heat top 106 rankings, or abnormal admission score records, indicating average social attention, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events interfering with application psychology; shares the discipline evaluation results of China University of Petroleum (Beijing), with Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering as A+ (top in the country), Chemical Engineering and Technology as A-, and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering as B+; main disciplines such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering have outstanding strength, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended; Petroleum Engineering-related majors have stable popularity; total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approx. 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approx. 462,767), with Physics Category candidates estimated at approx. 329,000 based on the recent proportion of about 61.5%, an increase of about 15.5%, intensifying competition; the school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Sichuan, belonging to cross-provincial long-distance schooling; in recent years, the school's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 5%-6%, making it one of the main source provinces in the Southwest region, with regional preference factors having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.8%), the increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province by about 15.5% intensifying competition, and the stable school reputation and stable attractiveness of petroleum main disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies); predicted minimum ranking approx. 43331st, range 42831–43831st.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approx. 43331st (range 42831–43831st). Candidates within the range should mainly fill Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Petroleum Engineering, Computer Science) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices; candidates significantly above the upper limit of the range (<42831st) can focus on Tier 1 majors; candidates near the lower limit of the range (>43831st) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022 approximately 9358th → 2023 approximately 7796th → 2024 approximately 7132th → 2025 approximately 8073th, the rankings over the past four years show a trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2025, it moved back about 941 places compared to 2024, competition slightly eased, baseline ranking approximately 8073th; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Sichuan: 2022 21 students, 2023 19 students, 2024 21 students, 2025 20 students, 2026 20 students, the plan has been basically stable between 19–21 students in recent years; 2026 is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, the parent university ranks approximately 62nd in the Soft Science main ranking (2026); the Karamay Campus shares the 211/Double First-Class status, but focuses mainly on science and engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts programs, thus its appeal to liberal arts candidates is relatively limited; the university has not appeared in recent school reputation public opinion, Douyin heat total ranking top 106, or abnormal admission score records, with general social attention and no obvious public opinion interference; the university's liberal arts programs (Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Russian, Ideological and Political Education) have no directly corresponding A-class discipline evaluations; Accounting can be mapped to Business Administration (A-), Chinese Language and Literature can be mapped to Chinese Language and Literature (B+), overall liberal arts advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Finance/Auditing socially hot recommended, Chinese Language/Literature socially hot recommended, Law (related Ideological and Political) divided wait-and-see, Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see; total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, estimated by the recent History Category proportion of about 38.5%, History Category candidates approximately 206,000, an increase of about 15.7%, competition intensifies; the university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Sichuan, with a narrow selection of liberal arts programs, and cross-province long-distance schooling has a certain dampening effect on liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of the ranking moving back in 2025, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged in 2026, the increase of about 15.7% in the number of History Category candidates in the province intensifying competition, as well as factors such as weak liberal arts advantages and remote location, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies); predicted minimum ranking approximately 8058th, range 7558–8558th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Ideological and Political Education (Karamay Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Russian (Karamay Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8058th (range 7558–8558th), it is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 programs as the main force, Tier 1 programs (Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education) as a sprint, and Tier 3 programs as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<7558th) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings close to the lower limit of the range (>8558th) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 programs as a safety net.
